title: Controlled Activation Handoff Plan

recommended_future_activation_path.title: Backend/Auth Architecture Blueprint
recommended_future_activation_path.purpose: Translate AG27C/AG27D planning into detailed backend/Auth architecture without creating live backend objects.

recommended_future_activation_path.title: Schema/RLS/Security Model and Controlled Activation Audit
recommended_future_activation_path.purpose: Prepare schema/RLS/security model and decide whether controlled sandbox activation can begin.

recommended_future_activation_path.title: Login UI and Route Scaffold
recommended_future_activation_path.purpose: Scaffold or connect login routes based on AG29 decision.

recommended_future_activation_path.title: Backend Queue and Article State Integration
recommended_future_activation_path.purpose: Integrate queue/state/publish workflow only after Auth and RLS validation.

minimum_future_activation_preconditions: Explicit user approval for controlled activation.
Admin and Editor test accounts planned securely.
No dynamic public publishing until Admin publish audit passes.
